mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_id, m.login_id, m.enabled, m.created_at, m.update_at, m.last_login, g.nickname, g.name, g.email, g.phone, g.point, g.grade, TO_CHAR(g.birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') birth, g.PROFILE_IMAGE_URL as profile_photo FROM member m LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m.member_id = g.member_id JOIN memberAuthority ma ON m.login_id = ma.login_id
AND ma.authority = 'GUEST'
AND
AND m.enabled = #{enabled}
ORDER BY m.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m JOIN memberAuthority ma ON m.login_id = ma.login_id
AND ma.authority = 'GUEST'
AND
AND m.enabled = #{enabled}
